description_long: This is a military-style helicopter with a streamlined fuselage painted in a green, brown, and black camouflage pattern. The helicopter features a long, narrow cockpit with dark-tinted windows and a prominent main rotor with two long, slender blades. The tail section is angular, with a vertical stabilizer and a small tail rotor, both painted to match the camouflage scheme. The landing gear consists of two sturdy, black skids attached to the fuselage with yellow supports. Markings on the side include the text 'BLEND28', a white star emblem, and the number '05', giving it an authentic military appearance.
description: A camouflaged military helicopter with a streamlined body, dark cockpit windows, and prominent rotor blades. Markings and sturdy landing skids enhance its realistic, tactical look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow cockpit, main rotor blades extending horizontally, and the symmetrical landing skids.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the 'BLEND28' marking, white star emblem, and the full length of the tail and skids.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail rotor, vertical stabilizer, and the symmetry of the tail section and skids.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit profile, '05' marking, and the full side of the helicopter with camouflage details.
attribute_rotor_blades: Two long, narrow main rotor blades, likely made of composite or metal, painted black with yellow tips, extending symmetrically from the rotor hub.
attribute_tail_rotor: A small, two-bladed tail rotor mounted vertically at the end of the tail boom, painted in camouflage colors with yellow tips.
attribute_landing_skids: Two parallel, black landing skids with yellow supports, made of metal tubing, attached to the underside of the fuselage with visible crossbars.
attribute_cockpit_windows: Three cockpit windows: one large, curved front window and two side windows, all dark-tinted with black framing, providing wide visibility.
